gt_sql: SELECT T2.surname FROM qualifying AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 ON T2.driverId = T1.driverId WHERE T1.raceId = 19 ORDER BY T1.q2 ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT d.surname
FROM qualifying q
JOIN drivers d ON q.driverId = d.driverId
WHERE q.raceId = 19
  AND q.q2 IS NOT NULL
  AND q.q2 != ''
ORDER BY CAST(q.q2 AS REAL)
LIMIT 1;
question: What is the surname of the driver with the best lap time in race number 19 in the second qualifying period?
